# CWE-15 negative: DSN not taken from untrusted request input
lang: go
file: CWE-15-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

// CWE-15 External Control of System or Configuration Setting (mitigated)
func ApplyRuntimeDSN(c *gin.Context, factory func(string) (*gorm.DB, error)) {
	dsn := os.Getenv("APP_DATABASE_URL")
	if dsn == "" {
		c.JSON(http.StatusServiceUnavailable, gin.H{"error": "database"})
		return
	}
	db, err := factory(dsn)
	if err != nil {
		c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": "database"})
		return
	}
	c.Set("db", db)
	c.Status(http.StatusOK)
}
